description: Workflow guidance hooks for playwright-recast demo video creation

hooks.prompt: Recording complete. Now call analyze_trace with the returned traceDir to detect steps and generate labels. After analysis, write voiceover text for each visible step using marketing tone: focus on client value, not UI mechanics.

Trace analyzed. Now write voiceover text for each visible step. Guidelines:
- Focus on client value (what it saves, simplifies, speeds up), NOT UI descriptions
- Never say 'the user clicks' — say what the action achieves
- Keep each step to 1-2 sentences, short-medium length
- Use professional, natural tone suitable for TTS
- First step: hook the viewer (name the problem being solved)
- Last step: soft call to action
- Present all steps to the user for review before calling render_video
